name: ItsAI
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN32 using the official ItsAI website and LLM-detection source repository.

gap_notes: No verified official docs URL yet.
No verified safe public subnet API endpoint yet.
No verified standalone static data artifact yet.

surfaces.name: ItsAI Python SDK (PyPI)
surfaces.notes: Published PyPI package `its-ai` ("Typed Python SDK client for ITS-AI API", author ITS AI <support@its-ai.org>), linked as the "Python SDK" from the official homepage.

surfaces.name: ItsAI API documentation
surfaces.notes: Official ItsAI documentation (page title "AI content detection API") on the team's docs.its-ai.org subdomain, linked from the homepage. Fills the file's noted missing-docs gap.

surfaces.name: ItsAI API repository
surfaces.notes: ItsAI API repository in the team's It-s-AI org; its README describes a FastAPI app that queries miners in "Subnet32: It's AI". Distinct from the registered llm-detection repo.

surfaces.name: ItsAI API health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning the ItsAI (SN32) content-detection API health as JSON. Hosted on api.its-ai.org, the API subdomain of the registered website its-ai.org; the API is documented at docs.its-ai.org and implemented in the team's It-s-AI/api FastAPI repo. Fills the file's noted missing public-API-endpoint gap.

surfaces.name: ItsAI SN32 leaderboard (Hugging Face Space)
surfaces.notes: Live SN32 miner leaderboard (UID/incentive/emission plus F1, false-positive, and average-precision scores from the Yuma validator) hosted as a public, no-auth Hugging Face Space. Explicitly named as the team's own leaderboard in docs/FAQ.md ("Yes, we do have a leaderboard based on OTF scores"); the app itself titles the page "Subnet 32 Leaderboard" and links back to github.com/It-s-AI/llm-detection. Fills the file's noted missing standalone-data-artifact gap.
